subcodes.first_line: O servant of the divine Threshold! Behold in this day the bounty of the Lord, that one such as thou and I [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه یزدان بخشایش خداوندیرا در این روزگار بنگر که مانند من و تو در
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @high station of the true believer, @rejection, opposition and persecution
